---
title: "Keynotes & Presentations"
title-block-style: none
description: "Access chen.ist keynote presentations and slides on cybersecurity, zero trust architecture, and technology leadership topics."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/keynotes/">
---

<div class="alert alert-info">
  <p>Redirecting to <a href="/keynotes/">Keynotes</a>...</p>
</div>

If you are not redirected automatically, please <a href="/keynotes/">click here</a>.
